title: The Century Report March 10, 2026
description:
The Century Report: March 10, 2026

Employees at OpenAI and Google - including Google DeepMind chief scientist Jeff Dean - filed an amicus brief in federal court today defending Anthropic's safety commitments against the Pentagon, just hours after Anthropic sued the Department of Defense in two courts simultaneously over a supply-chain risk designation its CFO says threatens up to $5 billion in revenue. The same edition: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build AI systems grounded in physical world understanding, ION Storage Systems becomes the first U.S. solid-state battery company to pass customer qualification, and researchers discover more than 200 metabolic enzymes operating inside the cell nucleus - a hidden biological system that may reshape cancer treatment.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-10-2026/

- Electrek - A US Startup Just Cleared a Major Solid-State Battery Milestone: https://electrek.co/2026/03/10/a-us-startup-just-cleared-a-major-solid-state-battery-milestone-production-is-next/
- Shared Sapience - The Last Difficult Decade: 2025-2035: https://sharedsapience.com/the-last-difficult-decade-2025-2035/
